overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through downtown Los Santos at night. The character passes the Mount Zonah Medical Center, crosses city streets with light traffic, and enters a municipal plaza featuring a large fountain. The scene is illuminated by warm street lighting against a dark clear sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past phone booths and newspaper vending machines

entered.detail: Two glass and metal phone booths with illuminated interiors
Red newspaper vending machines lined along the curb
Yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
Tall illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow city sidewalk at night, passing illuminated phone booths on the left and red newspaper stands on the right. The street is quiet with only occasional cars passing by, and the warm glow of streetlights illuminates the concrete path.

events.description: blue sports car drives past on the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking past the Mount Zonah Medical Center entrance as a sports car passes by on the street

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past the hospital entrance with headlights on

entered.detail: Large medical building with illuminated signage reading 'Mount Zonah Medical Center'
Glass and metal bus shelter with bench

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the sidewalk past the Mount Zonah Medical Center, a large institutional building with prominent signage. A blue sports car with bright headlights passes by on the street, and the character walks past a bus stop shelter.

events.description: red and white city bus passes by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking past the hospital complex as a city bus passes and approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: city bus with red and white livery driving along the street

entered.detail: Large red and white public transit bus with illuminated windows
Distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
Overhead traffic signal ganttry with illuminated lights

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sidewalk as a city bus passes on the street. The view opens up toward a major intersection with a distinctive tall cylindrical office building visible in the distance, and overhead traffic lights become visible as the character approaches the crossing.

events.description: character steps onto the crosswalk and begins crossing the street
black sedan passes by as the character continues crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: White church building with tower and illuminated windows
Grassy park area with trees on the opposite side of the street

segments.scene_description: The character steps off the curb and crosses the wide street intersection, moving from asphalt crosswalk markings toward the opposite sidewalk. A black sedan passes by on the left, and a white church building becomes visible across the street while the tall office building appears closer.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a park area with benches and grass lawns

entered.detail: Black metal park benches lining the pathway
Opening leading to a paved plaza with a fountain

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sidewalk bordering a park area with benches and manicured grass lawns. The pathway leads toward a plaza entrance visible ahead, while the tall office building recedes into the distance. The environment is quiet with minimal traffic.

events.description: character enters the paved plaza area and approaches the central fountain

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain in the plaza, exploring the open space

entered.detail: Large circular fountain with water jet shooting upward, illuminated by surrounding lights
Grand classical-style building with columns and illuminated entrance
Wide paved stone tiles covering the plaza ground

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious paved plaza and approaches a large illuminated fountain with a tall water jet. The character walks around the fountain feature, with a grand municipal building visible in the background. The area is completely pedestrianized with no vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet urban corridor that gradually opens into a grand, pedestrianized municipal plaza. It begins on a narrow city sidewalk illuminated by the warm glow of streetlights, passing phone booths and newspaper stands before moving past the institutional facade of the Mount Zonah Medical Center. As the character continues, the view expands toward a major intersection where a tall cylindrical office building looms in the distance and city buses pass by on the street. The scene then shifts as the camera crosses the wide asphalt intersection toward a white church, transitioning from the traffic of the main road to a peaceful park area with manicured lawns and benches. Finally, the path leads into a spacious paved plaza, where the camera circles a large illuminated fountain with a tall water jet set against the backdrop of a grand municipal building.
